name: Liberty Park
description: Come play pickleball at Liberty Park in Batesville, IN! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: SE Indiana YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at SE Indiana YMCA in Batesville, IN! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like water. A membership is required to play.

name: Southeastern Indiana YMCA Outdoor Community Sports Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Southeastern Indiana YMCA Outdoor Community Sports Complex in Batesville, IN! There are 8 concrete courts. 4 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available. Players have access to lights.
